entries.definition:
progress (see سدرة المنتهى sidrat ʾal-muntahā)), (83:18–21) كَلَّا إِنَّ
كِتَابَ الْأَبْرَارِ لَفِي عِلِّيِّينَ وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ مَا عِلِّيُّونَ كِتَابٌ مَرْقُومٌ يَشْهَدُهُ الْمُقَرَّبُونَ no
indeed!, the record of the truly good is in ʿilliyyīn; and how will
you come to understand what ʿilliyyīn is?, a clearly written book
witnessed by those brought near.
entries.definition_english:
progress (see سدرة المنتهى sidrat ʾal-muntahā)), (83:18–21) كَلَّا إِنَّ
كِتَابَ الْأَبْرَارِ لَفِي عِلِّيِّينَ وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ مَا عِلِّيُّونَ كِتَابٌ مَرْقُومٌ يَشْهَدُهُ الْمُقَرَّبُونَ no
indeed!, the record of the truly good is in ʿilliyyīn; and how will
you come to understand what ʿilliyyīn is?, a clearly written book
witnessed by those brought near.

entries.definition:
ʿ–l–y only the preposition عَلَى ʿalā and the quasi-imper. ʿalā
(اسم فعل الأمر على), as it is termed by the grammarians, are classified
under this root alone. ʿalā conveys the sense of on, above, upon,
on top of, over and various other context-bound senses as
illustrated below. ʿalā occurs some 1439 times in the Qur’an.

عَلَى ʿalā I [prep.] contextualised occurrences of ʿalā (على) in
the Qur’an are associated with various concepts including 1 on,
upon, above, aboard, either: a) physical place, as in (40:80) وَعَلَيْهَا
وَعَلَى الْفُلْكِ تُحْمَلُونَ and on them and on [board] ships you are borne;
*(22:11) وَمِنَ النَّاسِ مَنْ يَعْبُدُ اللَّهَ عَلَى حَرْفٍ among people there is the
one who serves God sitting on the fence [lit. upon the very edge]
or, b) abstract such as rank or degree, as in (2:253) فَضَّلْنَا بَعْضَهُمْ عَلَى
بَعْضٍ We favoured some of them above [the] others 2 by, at the
side of (20:10) أَوْ أَجِدُ عَلَى النَّارِ هُدًى or I may find guidance by the
fireside 3 responsibility (11:6) عَلَى اللَّهِ رِزْقُهَا the responsibility for
its livelihood is on God 4 [followed by أَنْ] in return for, on
condition that (28:27) إِنِّي أُرِيدُ أَنْ أُنْكِحَكَ إِحْدَى ابْنَتَيَّ هَاتَيْنِ عَلَى أَنْ تَأْجُرَنِي
ثَمَانِيَ حِجَجٍ I wish to marry you to one of these two daughters of
mine, on condition that you hire yourself to me for eight years 5
against (28:28) فَلَا عُدْوَانَ عَلَيَّ whichever of the two
terms I fulfil, let there be no censure of me 6 despite, in spite of
(13:6) وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَذُو مَغْفِرَةٍ لِلنَّاسِ عَلَى ظُلْمِهِمْ your Lord is rich in
forgiveness for people, despite their wrongdoing 7 for, on account
of (2:185) وَلِتُكَبِّرُوا اللَّهَ عَلَى مَا هَدَاكُمْ and to glorify Him for having
guided you 8 out of (76:8) وَيُطْعِمُونَ الطَّعَامَ عَلَى حُبِّهِ مِسْكِينًا وَيَتِيمًا وَأَسِيرًا
and they give food, out of love for Him (or, in spite of their loving
to eat it themselves) to the poor, the orphan and to [the freed]
captive 9 at a point in time (28:15) عَلَى حِينِ غَفْلَةٍ مِنْ أَهْلِهَا at a
moment when its people were inattentive 10 with, towards (23:5–
6) وَالَّذِينَ هُمْ لِفُرُوجِهِمْ حَافِظُونَ إِلَّا عَلَى أَزْوَاجِهِمْ those who guard their
chastity except with their spouses 11 from, off (83:2) إِذَا اكْتَالُوا عَلَى
النَّاسِ those who, when [in buying and] taking the measure
from people, demand it in full 12 about, concerning (7:105) لَا أَقُولُ
عَلَى اللَّهِ إِلَّا الْحَقَّ that I do not say anything concerning God but the
truth 13 in accordance with (6:135) اعْمَلُوا عَلَى مَكَانَتِكُمْ my
people, act in accordance with your ability/situation 14 in
conformity with, in adherence to (24:64) قَدْ يَعْلَمُ مَا أَنْتُمْ عَلَيْهِ He knows
what you adhere to (or, He knows what state you are in) II
[quasi-imper. v. I (اسم فعل أمر)] be responsible for, keep to (5:105)
عَلَيْكُمْ أَنْفُسَكُمْ be responsible (or, you are responsible) for your own
souls.

642

moment when its people were inattentive 10 with, towards (23:5–
6) وَالَّذِينَ هُمْ لِفُرُوجِهِمْ حَافِظُونَ إِلَّا عَلَى أَزْوَاجِهِمْ those who guard their
chastity except with their spouses 11 from, off (83:2) إِذَا اكْتَالُوا عَلَى
النَّاسِ those who, when [in buying and] taking the measure
from people, demand it in full 12 about, concerning (7:105) لَا أَقُولُ

truth 13 in accordance with (6:135) اعْمَلُوا عَلَى مَكَانَتِكُمْ my
people, act in accordance with your ability/situation 14 in
conformity with, in adherence to (24:64) قَدْ يَعْلَمُ مَا أَنْتُمْ عَلَيْهِ He knows
what you adhere to (or, He knows what state you are in) II
[quasi-imper. v. I (اسم فعل أمر)] be responsible for, keep to (5:105)

642
